sections.middle: No. 125 Electric Pokémon HT: 3'07" WT: 66.1 lbs. Thunder Shock 10 Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed. Thunder Punch 30+ Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage. If tails, this Pokémon does 10 damage to itself. weakness ×2 resistance -20 It loves to feed on strong electricity.
sections.bottom: #20 It occasionally appears around large power plants and so on. retreat cost Illus. Ken Sugimori ©2016 Pokémon 41/108
